_comment: DOCUMENTED pollution sources — public-record facilities plotted for context only. Per docs/SOURCE-POLICY.md: factual (name/type/operator from public records), cited, neutral language; NOT an assertion that a facility caused any sensor reading. Coordinates are approximate (facility-level) and should be verified/expanded from authoritative datasets (EPA FRS/ECHO/TRI, EIA). This is a seed; the full layer pulls from those sources + FracTracker.
disclaimer: Locations are public-record industrial facilities shown for perspective near community sensors. Presence on this map is not a claim that a facility caused any measured pollution.

sources.name: South Charleston chemical complex (former Union Carbide / Dow)
